display.purpose: Page section headings — one per view context.

headline.purpose: App name in navbar. Rarely used.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal headings, form section labels.

body.purpose: Default for all content. The interface is text-sm by default.

label.purpose: Button text, chip labels, nav items.

mono.purpose: Campaign IDs, account IDs, currency codes. Never sentence copy.

shadows.name: structure-separator
shadows.purpose: Navbar only. Separates sticky nav from content layer.

shadows.name: interactive-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Clickable cards on hover. Signal-blue ambient glow confirms interactivity.

shadows.name: login-elevation
shadows.purpose: Login panel card. Heavy lift from animated background. Not used in authenticated app.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Color and opacity state changes on interactive elements.

motion.name: content-transition
motion.purpose: Layout state changes: sidebar width, card border shifts, nav hover.

motion.name: fade-in-up
motion.purpose: Initial content reveal for lists (ad accounts, campaign lists). Staggered 50ms per item, max 300ms delay. Reduce to instant opacity at prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: pulse-dot
motion.purpose: ACTIVE status indicator dot only. Communicates live state. Remove at prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: skeleton-pulse
motion.purpose: Loading skeleton placeholder. Replaces all in-content spinners.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar collapses from overlay to inline. Mobile nav toggle appears below this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default CTA inside modals and confirmation panels. Near-white on dark.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; background: #f0f0f0; color: #111827; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, transform 50ms ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e0e0e0; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.6); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Default toolbar button for most actions (Refresh, Export, Duplicate).
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #9ca3af; border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.6); border-radius: 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out, transform 50ms ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(31,41,55,0.6); color: #e5e7eb; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.6); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-icon { width: 14px; height: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Facebook Login Button
components.description: Login page only. The Meta OAuth handoff. Full-saturation Facebook blue.
components.css: .ds-btn-facebook { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; gap: 10px; background: #1877F2; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out, transform 50ms ease; } .ds-btn-facebook:hover { background: #1568d3; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(24,119,242,0.25); } .ds-btn-facebook:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-fb-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Status Badge — Active
components.description: Campaign ACTIVE state. Pulsing dot signals live status.
components.css: .ds-status-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 10px; background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #34d399; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #34d399; flex-shrink: 0; animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-status-dot { animation: none; } }

components.name: Status Badge — Paused
components.description: Campaign PAUSED state. No animation — paused is not live.
components.css: .ds-status-paused { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; background: rgba(245,158,11,0.15); color: #fbbf24; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Card (Interactive)
components.description: Clickable card — ad account cards, campaign list items. Hover signals interactivity.
components.css: .ds-card-interactive { background: rgba(17,24,39,0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(55,65,81,0.6); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-card-interactive:hover { background: rgba(17,24,39,0.8); border-color: rgba(59,130,246,0.3); box-shadow: 0 0 20px -5px rgba(59,130,246,0.15); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #e5e7eb; margin: 0 0 4px 0; } .ds-card-meta { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input. Transparent background, translucent border, gray focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); color: #f9fafb; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(107,114,128,0.8); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(107,114,128,0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link. Active state uses signal-blue with left-rail indicator.
components.html: Drafts
components.css: .ds-nav-item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #6b7280; text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms ease-out, color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(31,41,55,0.6); color: #e5e7eb; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(37,99,235,0.15); color: #60a5fa; } .ds-nav-rail { display: none; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 3px; height: 20px; background: #3b82f6; border-radius: 0 9999px 9999px 0; } .ds-nav-item--active .ds-nav-rail { display: block; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-label { line-height: 1; }

components.name: Account Chip (Navbar)
components.description: Selected ad account or profile shown in navbar. Minimal blue tint, not a full badge.
components.css: .ds-account-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(59,130,246,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.15); border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #93c5fd; max-width: 140px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-account-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #60a5fa; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-account-name { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

narrative.overview:
AdSpawn is built for media buyers who treat campaign management as precision work. The interface is dark by design — not as aesthetic fashion, but because the people using it spend hours in it, often alongside Meta Ads Manager on a second monitor. The Mission Terminal is a workspace that disappears into the task: no decoration, no onboarding ceremony, no choreography.

The system is permanently dark. html.dark is hardcoded — there is no light mode, no toggle. The depth hierarchy runs from #030712 (page body) through #111827 (cards, panels) to #1f2937 (overlays, hover states). Signal blue (#3b82f6 / #60a5fa) is the sole operational accent: it marks interactive elements, active states, and Meta-connected context. It never decorates.

This system explicitly rejects two failure modes: the cluttered bureaucracy of Meta Ads Manager (everything visible, nothing scannable) and the cold monochrome of developer tools like Vercel (too terminal-native, no professional warmth).
keyCharacteristics: Always dark; depth through tonal layering, not shadows
One accent (signal blue) reserved for interaction and active state
Monospace for all technical values (campaign IDs, account IDs, currency codes)
Compact density: text-sm (14px) is the default, not the exception
Status is always explicit: ACTIVE / PAUSED / DELETED shown as colored badges, never inferred

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal blue is the only color used for interactive feedback across the authenticated app. Cyan marks ad account context. Emerald/amber mark campaign status. Destructive red marks errors. No other colors communicate state.

rules.name: The Translucency Rule
rules.body: Colored backgrounds for states use low-opacity tints over the dark surface, never solid fills. This keeps the dark environment intact while communicating state.

rules.name: The Mono Rule
rules.body: All technical identifiers — campaign IDs, account IDs, currency codes — are rendered in font-mono at 10–11px with ink-dim color. Monospace for identifiers, Inter for everything else: no exceptions.

rules.name: The One Scale Rule
rules.body: Body text is text-sm (14px). Not text-base unless it's an input or modal heading. Density is a feature, not a compromise.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface has a shadow at rest. Shadows are state feedback (hover) or structural separation (nav), never decoration. A card without a shadow is not unfinished — it is correct.

dos: Do use signal-blue (#60a5fa for text, #3b82f6 for backgrounds) exclusively for interactive and active state
Do use monospace (font-mono) for all technical identifiers: campaign IDs, account IDs, currency codes, version labels
Do show status explicitly via StatusBadge (ACTIVE / PAUSED / other) — never infer it from context or hide it
Do use active:scale-[0.98] on all buttons for a tactile press response
Do use skeleton placeholders during loading — never a centered spinner inside content areas
Do keep all borders as translucent white (border-white/10 family) or border-gray-800/60 equivalent
Do use text-sm (14px) as the default body text size — density is a feature
Do use prefers-reduced-motion to replace fade-in-up sequences with instant opacity
Do keep empty states instructional: show what action creates the missing data
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient) — replace with solid text-[#60a5fa]
Don't introduce a second accent color inside the authenticated app
Don't build interfaces that look like Meta Ads Manager: dense grids with no hierarchy
Don't go terminal-native (Vercel/Linear aesthetic): pure gray monochrome with no warmth
Don't use decorative motion in the authenticated app — float/orb/gradient animations are login-page only
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/border-right greater than 1px colored) on cards or list items
Don't create a light mode — the app is dark-only, html.dark is hardcoded
Don't use text-gray-600 or text-gray-700 for body copy on dark surfaces — fails 4.5:1 contrast
Don't use modal as a first resort — prefer inline edits, slide-over panels, inline validation
